title: Thriller Bark’s Zombies Awaken: Turning Point
description: In the Thriller Bark storyline, this section centers on Unknown person #4, Unknown person #3, Perona, Unknown person #8, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #7 as the scene develops across pages 14–17.
scene: This scene advances the Thriller Bark conflict through Unknown person #4, Unknown person #3, Perona, Unknown person #8, Unknown person #5, focusing on the immediate stakes of thriller bark’s zombies awaken: turning point.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: I'm sorry... I let my guard down!!

dialogue.speaker: Perona
dialogue.text: I didn't know there were more spiders.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: These are my underlings, the spider mice!!

dialogue.speaker: Perona
dialogue.text: We came from above the ceiling,

dialogue.speaker: Perona
dialogue.text: And caught your Nakama without a sound!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: I'm going to deliver binks's alcohol.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: The sea breeze waves as it pleases.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: The one who sings the songs is....!!

dialogue.speaker: Perona
dialogue.text: Huh... how did you come from below?

dialogue.speaker: Perona
dialogue.text: I just jumped, you see. I'm light.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Let's talk all about this island!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Are you one of the Pirates' Nakama?

summary: This scene advances the Thriller Bark conflict through Unknown person #4, Unknown person #3, Perona, Unknown person #8, Unknown person #5, focusing on the immediate stakes of thriller bark’s zombies awaken: turning point.
